zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Hilton於1455年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Godfrey Hilton II36歲，母親Marjory de Willoughby35歲。她於大約1476年與Richard Thimbleby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Hilton于1455年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Godfrey Hilton II36岁，母亲Marjory de Willoughby35岁。她于大约1476年与Richard Thimbleby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Hilton was born in 1455, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Godfrey Hilton II, was 36 and her mother, Marjory de Willoughby, was 35. She married Richard Thimbleby about 1476, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1522, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Hilton est née en 1455, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Godfrey Hilton II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marjory de Willoughby, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Thimbleby environ 1476, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Hilton 1455 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfrey Hilton II 36 und ihre Mutter Marjory de Willoughby 35. Sie hat um 1476 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Thimbleby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hilton è nata il nel 1455 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Godfrey Hilton II, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Marjory de Willoughby, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Richard Thimbleby circa 1476, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hiltonが1455年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Godfrey Hilton IIは36歳，母Marjory de Willoughbyは35歳であった。約1476年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでRichard Thimblebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Hilton(이)가 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfrey Hilton II(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjory de Willoughby(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Richard Thimbleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Hilton nasceu em 1455, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Godfrey Hilton II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marjory de Willoughby, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Thimbleby aproximadamente 1476, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Hilton родилась в 1455 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Godfrey Hilton II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory de Willoughby, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Thimbleby около 1476 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1522 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Hilton nació en 1455, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Godfrey Hilton II, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marjory de Willoughby, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Richard Thimbleby aproximadamente 1476, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1522, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
